case_title: R.C. AMORE REALTORS et al vs. WOOSTER, WILLIAM et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF COURT'S RULING ON DEMURRER FILED BY PLAINTIFF R.C. AMORE REALTORS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT WOOSTER, WILLIAM
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF R.C. AMORE REALTORS COURT TRIAL SET FOR FEB-08-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 03 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

CASE CALLED BEFORE HON. JOSEPH ORR IN DEPT. THREE. ALL PARTIES WERE PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT, WILLIAM WOOSTER. THE USE OF A COURT REPORTER WAS WAIVED. MARY CANOVA-SEBEK, PROPERTY MANAGER FOR 1635 JONES, WAS SWORN AND EXAMINED. TESTIMONY WAS GIVEN BY MS. SEBEK AS TO NON PAYMENT OF RENT BY DEFENDANT, WOOSTER AND SERVICE OF A THREE DAY NOTICE TO PAY RENT OR QUIT. THE LEASE, IN THIS CASE WAS ORAL. THE COURT AWARDED RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 1635 JONES STREET, #L SAN FRANCISCO TO PLAINTIFF, R.C. AMORE ALONG WITH $L,053.88 RENT AND DAMAGES. THE ORAL LEASE IS FORFEITED. ATTORNEY'S FEES, COSTS AND INTEREST ARE WAIVED. PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY IS TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOOSTER, WILLIAM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1635 JONES STREET, #L, SAN FRANCISCO $1,053.88 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,053.88, LEASE FORFEITED
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE DRV IS $15.49 FILED BY PLAINTIFF R.C. AMORE REALTORS
